note: Raw human-judgment layer from the eligibility adjudication fan-out (20 agents reading Memory Alpha). Each entry is ONE reader-agent report on a character: the transformation they saw, whether the performer was visible as themselves, their GROW hint, and the pages they consulted. This is NOT the evidence of record — ds9-eligibility-adjudicate.mjs pins each cited page (revision+hash) and extracts a VERIFIED affirmative basis quote before any verdict is derived.
